name: Smoothies
recipeIngredient: frozen banana (peel a very ripe/nearly overripe banana and freeze it)
1 cup (approx.) your favorite fruit - I like strawberries!
1/2 cup to 1 cup apple juice or nonfat soymilk (or any preferred liquid, adjust amount for desired thickness)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel a very ripe or nearly overripe banana and freeze it.
2. Add the frozen banana to the blender.
3. Add 1 cup of your favorite fruit (e.g., strawberries).
4. Add 1/2 cup to 1 cup of apple juice, nonfat soymilk, or any preferred liquid.
5. Blend until smooth.
